Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AF Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Exploration.

Quest Text

Description

Captain, we have allied upgrade stations placed around the galaxy. Press 'M' to locate the station in this system and go pay them a visit.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.
